Some NLP Projects I’ve done while watching the CS388/AI388/DSC395T: Natural Language Processing graduate course at UT. Haven’t officially attended the class at UT yet, but there’s a youtube playlist and course page that is really useful. There’s actually 2 courses that go along with the youtube playlist, the other one is CS371N: Natural Language Processing which covers a little less of the youtube playlist. I’m still going through the course, and plan to make more progress in the coming breaks.


Github repository!

Deep Averaging Network
